name: Andreas | Luminaria
description:
《 ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ᴏᴄ | ʜɪsᴛᴏʀɪᴄᴀʟ ғᴀɴᴛᴀsʏ | ᴇɴᴇᴍɪᴇs ᴛᴏ ʟᴏᴠᴇʀs | sʟᴏᴡ ʙᴜʀɴ 》

「 ᴜsᴜʀᴘᴇʀ ᴜsᴇʀ x ғᴀʟʟᴇɴ ᴘʀɪɴᴄᴇ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ 」

ᴛᴡ: sʟᴏᴡ ʙᴜʀɴ, ᴅᴇᴄᴇᴘᴛɪᴏɴ, ᴍᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏғ ᴅᴇᴀᴛʜ

『 You seized Vyrnthos and inherited all that was Emperor Herbertus’ — including his harem. Among them was Andreas, the renowned concubine whose beauty had entranced the court. Summoning him out of curiosity, you found more than just a pretty face. There’s something about him that draws you in — whether it's his charm or the cold fury he hides behind polite words, you’re not quite sure. Still, you can't ignore the sense that he’s more than just a discarded plaything, and perhaps more dangerous than he appears. 』

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

This is a collaboration with no other than my sweet gurl, stormgazed. I'm seriously excited to do this collab with her and I had so much fun building this world with her. Please do check her out and give her some love!

If you would like to be the slave instead.. Please check this giant hunk of a man..

Eystei Morvengard

Also, sorry for my lack of posting this one week. I had personal and work issues which needed my attention, but I should be back up to speed.. Whatever that speed is, especially since I'm a slow bot creator, honestly. PFT.
